V0010_01_00_01_1.text: You will plummet into the shadows!

V0010_01_00_03_0.text: I hope you're prepared to be swallowed up by the darkness!

V0010_01_00_04_0.text: Yugi... A Duel with you is the ultimate Shadow Game...

V0010_01_00_05_0.text: I see such fear in your eyes!

V0010_01_00_05_1.text: Foolish girl, the Shadow Realm hungers for you!

V0010_01_00_06_0.text: Only one of us will survive this Shadow Game!

V0010_01_00_06_1.text: And you won't be the one!

V0010_01_00_07_0.text: You've always been a thorn in my side, Sister. It's time I remove it.

V0010_01_00_08_1.text: It's time to take a one-way trip to the Shadow Realm!

V0010_01_00_09_0.text: Anger and hatred festered within your soul!

V0010_01_00_09_1.text:
Giving rise to me!
Your true darkness!

V0010_03_00_04_0.text: How can I be falling behind...

V0010_05_00_00_0.text: The Egyptian Gods have chosen me to wield their immeasurable power!

V0010_06_01_01_0.text: It feels so good when my enemy falls right into my trap!

V0010_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Attack Position!

V0010_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0010_18_00_00_0.text: I attack you directly with my monster!

V0010_16_00_01_0.text: It's time to end this Duel!

V0010_21_00_00_0.text: My turn is done, as will you be.

V0010_21_00_04_0.text:
Don't be scared to attack me.
Haaaaahahahahaha!

V0010_21_00_05_0.text: Enjoy these moments while you can...

V0010_28_00_01_0.text: Heheheh... I always knew I was destined for greatness.

V0010_28_00_02_0.text: The darkness is here to stay.

V0010_28_00_03_0.text: Poor Mai. Your mind is a mere shadow of its former self and it's growing even dimmer.

V0010_28_00_04_0.text: There goes another soul into the dark abyss of the Shadow Realm to wander the emptiness for eternity!

V0010_28_00_05_0.text: Hmph. You claim to embody the power of the shadows, but I am the true darkness!

V0010_28_00_06_0.text:
Be gone!
All you ever did was hold me back!

V0010_29_00_01_0.text: Ngh... How could I lose to a peon like you?

V0010_29_00_04_0.text: Heheheh... You always were more deceptive than you pretend to be, Sister.

V0010_33_00_00_0.text: Hahaha... The worst is yet to come!

V0010_30_00_00_0.text: There's nothing I like more than toying with someone's mind!

V0010_30_00_01_0.text: Aaahahaha! Your frustration brings me joy!

V0010_30_00_02_0.text: Make your move, unless you're willing to admit defeat!

V0010_34_00_00_0.text: You shall pay for meddling with forces beyond your control!

V0010_34_00_01_0.text: Suffer as the darkness engulfs you!

V0010_34_00_02_0.text: You will be cast into the shadows!

V0010_34_00_03_0.text: Heheh... Not bad. Let's see you do more.

V0010_34_00_06_0.text: How wonderful when a Duel proceeds exactly as planned.

V0010_34_00_07_0.text: I admit that you've done well so far, but that will come to an end.

V0010_34_00_08_0.text: Entertain me. Show me what you can do.

V0010_34_00_09_0.text: Hmph. I'll spare you for the time being...

V0010_36_00_00_0.text: Offer up those fools to the Shadow Realm!

V0010_36_00_02_0.text:
Finish 'em already!
While you still have LP left!

V0010_27_00_02_0.text: Is that the best you've got?

V0010_08_00_00_0.text: I activate my Spell, Monster Reborn!

V0010_08_00_01_0.text: I activate my Spell, Magical Stone Excavation!

V0010_08_00_02_0.text: Prepare to live out your worst nightmare!

V0010_08_00_02_1.text: I activate the Trap Card, Nightmare Wheel!

V0010_08_00_47_0.text: Feel the pain as Nightmare Wheel shaves your LP away!

V0010_08_00_03_0.text: I now activate a trap! Hidden Soldiers!

V0010_08_00_04_0.text: I activate my Continuous Trap, Coffin Seller!

V0010_08_00_50_0.text: Every time your monster is sent to the Graveyard, you lose 300 Life Points.

V0010_08_00_06_0.text: Behold a trap that nightmares are made of - Metal Reflect Slime!

V0010_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Trap, Card of Last Will!

V0010_08_00_09_0.text: I activate my Trap, Mirror Force!

V0010_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Blaze Cannon!

V0010_08_00_11_0.text: I offer up my monster to strengthen Ra!

V0010_08_00_12_0.text: Ra's attack destroys all your monsters this turn!

V0010_08_00_13_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Ancient Chant!

V0010_08_00_13_1.text: I reveal one of Ra's three powerful effects!

V0010_08_00_14_0.text: I activate Ancient Chant's effect from the Graveyard!

V0010_08_00_14_1.text: Ra gains the strength of the monsters used to Summon it!

V0010_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
The True Sun God!

V0010_08_00_15_1.text: I never expected I'd have to show you Ra's true form...

V0010_08_00_16_0.text: I activate The True Sun God's effect!

V0010_08_00_16_1.text: Allowing Ra to sleep in my Graveyard can be dangerous...

V0010_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Millennium Revelation!

V0010_08_00_17_1.text: The Millennium Rod gives me access to secrets untold!

V0010_08_00_18_1.text: My Deck allows my Egyptian God to revive again and again!

V0010_08_00_19_1.text: Now I can resurrect Ra exactly when I want.

V0010_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Sun God Unification!

V0010_08_00_21_0.text: I activate Sun God Unification's effect!

V0010_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate Sun God Unification's effect.
Heh heh heh...

V0010_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Jam Breeding Machine!

V0010_08_00_25_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Jam Defender!

V0010_08_00_27_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Monster Rebirth!

V0010_08_00_28_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
The Mask of Remnants!

V0010_08_00_30_0.text: The Continuous Spell Card, Vengeful Bog Spirit!

V0010_08_00_31_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Machine Duplication!

V0010_08_00_32_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Pot of Greed!

V0010_08_00_33_0.text: I equip Black Pendant on a monster!

V0010_08_00_34_0.text:
Heh heh...
Due to Black Pendant's effect, you take damage!

V0010_08_00_35_0.text: This card will be the cause of your defeat.

V0010_08_00_35_1.text: I activate the Spell Card, Left Arm Offering!

V0010_08_00_36_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Card of Safe Return!

V0010_08_00_37_0.text: Card of Safe Return's effect activates!

V0010_08_00_38_0.text:
I'll activate this Quick-Play Spell!
Spell of Pain!

V0010_08_00_39_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Card of Sanctity!

V0010_08_00_40_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Tribute Burial!

V0010_08_00_41_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Infinite Cards!

V0010_08_00_42_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Polymerization!

V0010_08_00_43_0.text:
I'm going to activate my Quick-Play Spell!
De-Fusion!

V0010_08_00_44_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Remove Trap!

V0010_08_00_45_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Dark Spell Regeneration!

V0010_08_00_46_0.text: I activate Dark Spell Regeneration from my Graveyard!

V0010_08_00_46_1.text: The Egyptian God rises again upon this land!

V0010_08_00_48_0.text: Your very own mind will fight against you!

V0010_08_00_49_0.text:
I'll activate this Trap Card!
Rope of Life!

V0010_08_00_49_1.text: I have to risk my entire hand.

V0010_09_00_00_0.text: With its special ability, behold the true form of Ra!

V0010_09_00_01_0.text: I'll use The Winged Dragon of Ra's effect!

V0010_09_00_01_2.text: My Egyptian God and I become one!

V0010_09_00_02_0.text: Helpoemer's special ability will surely not help you!

V0010_09_00_02_1.text: You must discard 1 card from your hand into the Graveyard!

V0010_09_00_03_1.text: Fire your arrow! Crossbow of Calamity!

V0010_09_00_28_1.text: Fire your arrow! Crossbow of Calamity!

V0010_09_00_05_0.text: I activate Legendary Fiend's special ability!

V0010_09_00_05_1.text: You'd best destroy it quickly - it gains Attack Points every turn!

V0010_09_00_07_0.text: Allow me to reveal another one of Ra's effects!

V0010_09_00_07_1.text: My Winged Dragon obeys those who chant its ancient words!

V0010_09_00_08_0.text:
My Dragon!
Revive and emerge as the unstoppable phoenix!

V0010_09_00_09_0.text: The Phoenix instantly incinerates anyone in its path!

V0010_09_00_12_0.text: Byser Shock's effect returns our Set cards to our hands!

V0010_09_00_17_0.text: Juragedo activates its effect from my hand!

V0010_09_00_19_0.text: Do you know that Dark Jeroid has a powerful effect?

V0010_09_00_20_1.text: Now your monster can't move at all!

V0010_09_00_21_0.text: Holding Legs has an effect as well.

V0010_09_00_21_1.text: All Set cards on the field return to our hands!

V0010_09_00_22_0.text: I activate Holding Legs's effect from my Graveyard!

V0010_09_00_24_0.text: Lord Poison's effect activates when it's destroyed!

V0010_09_00_25_0.text: Makyura the Destructor has an effect you don't suspect...

V0010_09_00_25_1.text: When it's defeated, I can activate a Trap Card from my hand!

V0010_09_00_26_0.text: You'll find that Viser Des's effect is quite constricting.

V0010_09_00_26_1.text: It squeezes your monster to destruction over three turns!

V0010_37_00_00_0.text: Envelop the deserts with your glow and cast your rage!

V0010_13_00_00_0.text:
Appear as I call your name!
The Winged Dragon of Ra!

V0010_13_00_06_0.text:
Emerge!
The Winged Dragon of Ra - Sphere Mode!

V0010_37_00_01_0.text: Resurrect from the earth and rise into the sky!

V0010_13_00_08_0.text: The Winged Dragon of Ra - Immortal Phoenix!

V0010_37_00_02_0.text: By Tributing 2 monsters on your side of the field, I'm gifting you this powerful monster!

V0010_13_00_05_1.text: Its special ability will come in handy.

V0010_13_00_09_0.text: I Special Summon Masked Beast Des Gardius!

V0010_13_00_18_0.text: I Special Summon a Slime Token!

V0010_13_00_29_0.text: I Special Summon a Lekunga Token!

V0010_19_00_00_0.text: Ra, cast your rage upon my foe!

V0010_19_00_02_0.text: Ra, cast your rage upon my foe!

V0010_19_00_03_0.text: Incinerate all in your wake, Immortal Phoenix!

V0010_19_00_32_0.text: You hurt me, it's only right that I hurt you!

V0010_19_00_33_0.text: I'll attack with my Viser Des!

V0010_49_00_00_0.text: If this is what you want...
